What We Do

Our Services

From concept to launch — we offer end-to-end creative and technical services for game developers and studios worldwide.

Full-cycle game development from concept to launch.

How we created infinitely varied environments for Star Forge using Unity's Job System and Burst Compiler.

What we shipped, what we learned, and where we're going in 2025.

Our Journey

Studio Story

2023
🌱

Studio Founded

Fluke Game Studio was born with a single passion: build games that matter. Started as a solo project and quickly grew.

2024
🚀

First Game Released

Neon Drift launched on Steam and mobile — our first full commercial release. Pixel Warriors had already shipped earlier as a web game.

2024
📦

Asset Store Launch

Launched our first asset pack on Unity Asset Store. The Sci-Fi Props vol.1 hit over 200 downloads in the first month.

2025
⚡

Studio Expansion

Grew to a team of 4 full-time creators. Took on our first contract development clients and launched web dev services.

2025
⚔️

Shadow Realm in Development

Our most ambitious project yet — an open-world dark fantasy action RPG built in Unreal Engine 5.

Chapter 01-05

The Crew

Meet the Team

👤

Alex Rivera

Founder & Game Director

Visionary behind Fluke Game Studio. 8+ years in indie game development with a passion for immersive worlds.

Game DesignUnityUnrealTeam Leadership
👤

Maya Chen

Lead Artist & 3D Designer

Creates the stunning visuals and 3D assets that define Fluke's visual identity.

3D ModelingBlenderSubstance PainterConcept Art
👤

Jordan Blake

Lead Developer

Full-stack game developer specializing in Unity, Unreal, and multiplayer systems.

UnityUnreal Engine 5C#Networking
👤

Sam Park

Sound Designer & Composer

Crafts the immersive audio landscapes and original soundtracks for Fluke's productions.

Sound DesignCompositionFMODWwise
